name: Linsips
short_description: Divide chaos into order! In Linsips, place two lines to split bouncing balls into four quadrants with the exact same number of balls in each. 20 levels of pure arcade precision with authentic OPL3 FM synth music, MS-DOS aesthetics, all under 600 KB on SteamOS.
detailed_description:
CAN YOU DIVIDE CHAOS INTO PERFECT ORDER?

In Linsips, colorful balls bounce relentlessly across the screen. Your mission: place one horizontal and one vertical line to create four quadrants with the exact same number of balls in each. Every ball moves independently with its own speed, trajectory, and size. The moment you commit to your first line, there's no going back. The clock doesn't stop. The balls don't wait. Read the patterns, predict the movements, and strike with surgical precision.

KEY FEATURES

  • Strategic Chaos: Calculate the perfect moment to divide bouncing balls equally. One miscalculation and your quadrants fall apart.

  • 20 Levels of Escalating Madness: From simple four-ball warmups to frantic multi-ball challenges that demand sharper reflexes and smarter strategies.

  • Authentic OPL3 Soundtrack: Pulse-pounding FM synth music straight from the MS-DOS era.

  • Ultra-Lightweight Retro Package: Under 600 KB on SteamOS. No bloat, no filler, pure arcade puzzle action with DOS aesthetics.

You are the line between order and failure. Step into Linsips. Draw your lines. Claim your victory.

reviews.review_text: A good idea with excellent execution. The gameplay has a good progression in difficulty, and the physics are nice. I wish it was a longer, I would probably pay for a secuel like this. Very lightweight and well optimized. The music brings back old memories. Congrats! I've followed you to stay updated in the future!

Short and sweet puzzle game.

Unlike other developers, they released something that worked and they understood on a technical level.

Graphics fidelity: I guess it has color
